conclusion: ยังสรุปไม่ได้
conclusion_reason: Entry timing can be compared on current real artifacts, but all scenarios remain under-sampled and underpowered.

dsr_assessment.reason: DSR is blocked because this is a multi-scenario timing grid, all scenarios are under-sampled, and no production timing rule is selected.
required_before_acceptance: effective number of independent timing trials

methodology.chronological_policy: 2023-03-01..2023-12-29 in-sample, 2024-01-02..2024-12-31 OOS; no OOS tuning from this report.
methodology.data_policy: No new paid data was downloaded for this experiment.
methodology.scope: Sub-System A ORB breakout-time sensitivity and Sub-System B fixed put-ratio entry-snapshot sensitivity.
methodology.selection_policy: Best scenarios are diagnostic only. No production entry time is selected from this under-sampled grid.
methodology.subsystem_a_policy: Recompute opening range and breakout decision for each candidate breakout timestamp.
methodology.subsystem_b_policy: Use exact 09:55..10:00 put snapshots for the existing capped put-ratio feasibility template.
